themeWords.meaning: the personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD
son, child; a descendant or member of a family

sentenceTheme: Human efforts are futile without the LORD’s blessing; children are His gracious reward and strength.

verses.text: Except the LORD build the house, they labour in vain that build it: except the LORD keep the city, the watchman waketh but in vain.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD
house, household, dwelling; temple or family

verses.text: It is vain for you to rise up early, to sit up late, to eat the bread of sorrows: for so he giveth his beloved sleep.
Lo, children are an heritage of the LORD: and the fruit of the womb is his reward.

highlightedWords.meaning: son, child; a descendant or member of a family

verses.text: As arrows are in the hand of a mighty man; so are children of the youth.

highlightedWords.meaning: arrow; a missile shot from a bow
strong, mighty; a valiant warrior or hero

verses.text: Happy is the man that hath his quiver full of them: they shall not be ashamed, but they shall speak with the enemies in the gate.

highlightedWords.meaning: gate; entrance of a city where legal matters were decided
